underlying_goal: Resume GSDR project work, plan and execute Phase 57.1 (explore skill adoption), collect signals, and ship as a patch release
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly mislabeled the log sensor as 'DISABLED' and skipped it without verifying, prompting user frustration ('why does that keep fucking happening')
brief_summary: User resumed GSDR work, restructured roadmap, planned/executed/released Phase 57.1 as v1.19.2 patch, and installed GSDR locally and globally — all completed successfully despite friction over a mislabeled log sensor.
